sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this RPG

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Combat Movement
special_mechanics.description: Party members move in tactical top-down isometric view during combat sequences. Movement is turn-based rather than real-time, following AD&D rule set mechanics.

special_mechanics.name: Party Navigation
special_mechanics.description: First-person perspective exploration mode with party movement controlled via menu-based interface. Sprite variations indicate short-, medium-, and long-range encounter distances.

special_mechanics.name: Combat Actions
special_mechanics.description: Class-specific movement options: fighters can use melee/ranged, magic-users cast spells, thieves can backstab via positioning. Fighters gain multiple attacks per round and sweep attacks at higher levels.

tier_notes: Tier 2: RPG with no traditional platformer physics. Movement is entirely turn-based and tactical rather than real-time physics-driven. No jump mechanics, gravity, or sub-pixel systems are applicable to this game paradigm.
